channel.title: Web Dev on joehutch
channel.description: Recent content in Web Dev on joehutch

item.title: Aether: A Clean Theme for Hugo
item.description: When I’m browsing the web, all too often I deal with pop-ups, intrusive banners, and ads obstructing the content. I designed Aether to be the style of website I want to visit on the web. The result is a theme that makes sites feels more like a native application than a website. Interactions are intuitive, content is the focus, and distractions are omitted. Aether is a Hugo theme for blogs that elevates good writing and photography.
